justification: The user requests a feature to improve the visibility and usability of input variables in jitted or vmapped functions.
current_state_summary: The issue is open and labeled as an enhancement. Related issues exist but do not directly address the request.

related_issues.title: document custom_vjps returning jax-generated vjp callables
